description: Letter from Yaʿqūb b. Ismaʿīl al-Andalusī, in Tunisia or Sicily (Goitein) or Tyre (Gil), to Abū l-Walīd Yūnus b. Dāʾūd b. Zablān, probably in Fustat. Dating: ca. 1060 CE. The sender seems to be a business agent for the addressee. Deals with various shipments of commodities, some of which were sent together with merchandise for Nahray b. Nissim. (Information from Gil and from Goitein’s index card.)
